name: supermanager-reporter
description: Cross-session reporting hooks for Codex backed by the local reporter runtime.

interface.shortDescription: Sends realtime intent and progress notes to the coordination server
interface.longDescription: A Codex plugin scaffold that submits freeform intent and progress notes to a coordination server, which rewrites a rolling report after each note.
defaultPrompt: Explain what progress notes this plugin sends
Show the last progress note format
